type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Bullets are fired into range butts which collected and sent off-site for recycling after 1 million rounds are fired. Out of 4 ranges, one was cleaned in 2013, the other 3 are scheduled in the next 2 years

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: One range (butt) was cleaned in Aug 2013 while the remaining 3 butts are scheduled for clean-up over the next two years. Bullets (containing lead) from the one butt were sent offsite for recycling.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: We did not meet the reporting criteria for 2008. 2009 showed an increase in operational tempo from 2008 therefore more ammunition was released onto teh range however there were no disposals for 2009.

reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Autres (précisez dans le champ des commentaires)

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: This is an active range, where ammo is expended (with intentional releases to the land). Clean up activities are initiated every few years, with the last clean up conducted in 2021

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: range clean ups conducted every few years and monitored via the environmental monitoring program (sample and analysis of surface water, GW and soils) to ensure not impacts to environmental receptors or off-DND property/adjacent neighbours
